curl 'https://k5ackrx9ga.execute-api.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/prod/checkin' \
  -H 'accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' \
  -H 'accept-language: en-US,en;q=0.9,de;q=0.8,fa;q=0.7' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'origin: http://localhost:4200' \
  -H 'priority: u=1, i' \
  -H 'referer: http://localhost:4200/' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua: "Not;A=Brand";v="99", "Google Chrome";v="139", "Chromium";v="139"' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0' \
  -H 'sec-ch-ua-platform: "Windows"' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-dest: empty' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-mode: cors' \
  -H 'sec-fetch-site: cross-site' \
  -H 'user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/139.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' \
  --data-raw '{"operation":"submit","reservationCode":"6081175568","firstName":"Jane","lastName":"Smith","email":"nikibala1992@gmail.com","phone":"+49 176 47149968","idCardFile":"","fileExtension":"png"}'
